Class ImmutableArray<S extends @Nullable Object>

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.util.collection.ImmutableArray<S>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Iterable<S>
public class ImmutableArray<S extends @Nullable Object> extends Object implements Iterable<S>, Serializable
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ImmutableArray()
    creates an empty new Array
    ImmutableArray(@NonNull Collection<? extends S> list)
    creates a new immutable array with the contents of the given collection.
    ImmutableArray(S... arr)
    creates a new Array

  • Constructor Details

    • ImmutableArray

      public ImmutableArray()
      creates an empty new Array

    • ImmutableArray

      public ImmutableArray(S... arr)
      creates a new Array
      Parameters:
      arr - the ProgrammElement array to wrap

    • ImmutableArray

      public ImmutableArray(S[] arr, int lower, int upper)

    • ImmutableArray

      public ImmutableArray(@NonNull Collection<? extends S> list)

      creates a new immutable array with the contents of the given collection.

      The order of elements is defined by the collection.

      Parameters:
      list - a non-null collection (order is preserved)

  • Method Details

    • get

      public final S get(int pos)
      gets the element at the specified position
      Parameters:
      pos - an int describing the position
      Returns:
      the element at pos

    • last

      public final S last()
      returns the last element of the array
      Returns:
      the element at position size() - 1

    • size

      public int size()
      Returns:
      size of the array

    • arraycopy

      public void arraycopy(int srcIdx, Object dest, int destIndex, int length)

    • isEmpty

      public final boolean isEmpty()

    • contains

      public boolean contains(S op)

    • toArray

      public <T> T[] toArray(T[] array)
      Convert the array to a Java array (O(n))
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if T is not a supertype of S

    • toImmutableList

      public ImmutableList<S> toImmutableList()
      Convert an ImmutableArray to an ImmutableList.
      Returns:
      This element converted to an ImmutableList.

    • toList

      public List<S> toList()
      Convert an ImmutableArray to a List.
      Returns:
      A freshly created List containing the elements of this array.

      public Stream<S> stream()
      A stream object for this collection.
      Returns:
